pattern: Rectangle' does not contain a definition for 'Urx'
fix_guidance: Replace the lowercase property names (Urx, Llx, Ury, Lly) with the correct Aspose.Pdf.Rectangle uppercase properties (URX, LLX, URY, LLY) and ensure the Aspose.Pdf namespace is referenced.

pattern: HeaderFooter' does not contain a definition for 'HtmlFragment'
fix_guidance: Replace the nonexistent HtmlFragment property with a Paragraph addition: header.Paragraphs.Add(new HtmlFragment(yourHtml)); ensure Aspose.Pdf.Text is imported.

pattern: The type or namespace name 'PathSegment' does not exist in the namespace 'Aspose\.Pdf\.Drawing'
fix_guidance: Replace the incorrect 'Aspose.Pdf.Drawing' namespace with 'Aspose.Pdf.Operators' (add `using Aspose.Pdf.Operators;`) and ensure the project references a recent Aspose.Pdf for .NET version that includes the PathSegment class.

pattern: PageNumberStamp' does not contain a definition for 'Text'
fix_guidance: Replace the nonexistent 'Text' property with the 'TextState' property (e.g., stamp.TextState.Font = ...) and ensure you import Aspose.Pdf.Text.

pattern: TextFragmentState' does not contain a definition for 'Rise'|TextState' does not contain a definition for 'Rise'
fix_guidance: Upgrade to a newer Aspose.Pdf for .NET version that includes the Rise property (e.g., 22.9 or later), or replace the usage with supported vertical offset techniques such as adjusting FontSize and YIndent.

pattern: Cannot implicitly convert type 'string' to 'Aspose\.Pdf\.Text\.Font'
fix_guidance: Assign a Font object instead of a string, e.g., pageNumberStamp.TextState.Font = FontRepository.FindFont("Arial");

pattern: The annotation for nullable reference types should only be used in code within a '#nullable' annotations context
fix_guidance: Add '#nullable enable' (or disable) at the top of the file or enable nullable reference types for the project, or remove the nullable annotations if not needed.

pattern: Page' does not contain a definition for 'HeaderFooterSettings'
fix_guidance: Use the Page.Header and Page.Footer properties (or Document.HeaderFooterSettings for document‑wide settings) instead of a non‑existent HeaderFooterSettings member on Page.

pattern: Argument 2: cannot convert from 'Aspose\.Pdf\.XmlLoadOptions' to 'string'
fix_guidance: Pass the XML file path as the first argument and the XmlLoadOptions instance as the second argument to the Document constructor (e.g., new Document(xmlFilePath, xmlLoadOptions)).

pattern: cannot reference a type through an expression; try 'Page\.BeforePageGenerate' instead
fix_guidance: Reference the event on the Page type (e.g., Page.BeforePageGenerate += ...) instead of accessing it through an instance variable.

pattern: Note.*ActualText
fix_guidance: Replace the nonexistent 'ActualText' property with the 'Text' property on the Note object (e.g., note.Text = footnoteText).

pattern: CS0234: The type or namespace name 'Outline' does not exist in the namespace 'Aspose\.Pdf'
fix_guidance: Remove the nonexistent `using Aspose.Pdf.Outline;` directive and access outlines via `Document.Outlines` (e.g., `pdfDoc.Outlines`) after ensuring the correct Aspose.Pdf assembly version is referenced.

pattern: Destination' could not be found
fix_guidance: Replace the unavailable Destination class with GoToAction (e.g., outlineItem.Action = new GoToAction(pdfDoc.Pages[1])) and add the required using directive: using Aspose.Pdf.Annotations;

pattern: Page' does not contain a definition for 'Transition'
fix_guidance: Replace the nonexistent Page.Transition usage with Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfPageEditor: set its TransitionType and TransitionDuration properties and call ApplyChanges() to apply page transitions.

pattern: The type or namespace name 'Border' could not be found
fix_guidance: Add `using Aspose.Pdf.Drawing;` and replace `Border` with `BorderInfo` (or the appropriate Aspose border class) to resolve the missing type.

pattern: Property or indexer 'TextFragment\.TextState' cannot be assigned to
fix_guidance: Do not assign a new TextState to TextFragment.TextState; instead modify the existing TextState's properties (e.g., Font, FontSize, ForegroundColor) directly.

pattern: The type or namespace name 'Svg' does not exist in the namespace 'Aspose\.Pdf'
fix_guidance: Add a reference to the Aspose.Pdf.Svg assembly (e.g., install the Aspose.Pdf.Svg NuGet package) and include the appropriate using directive such as `using Aspose.Pdf.Svg;`.

pattern: The type or namespace name 'Tables' does not exist in the namespace 'Aspose\.Pdf'
fix_guidance: Remove or correct the `using Aspose.Pdf.Tables;` directive and ensure you reference a version of Aspose.Pdf where the Table class resides directly in the `Aspose.Pdf` namespace.

pattern: Cell' does not contain a definition for 'MarginInfo'
fix_guidance: Replace the nonexistent 'MarginInfo' member with the 'Margin' property, assigning a new Aspose.Pdf.MarginInfo instance (e.g., cell.Margin = new MarginInfo { Left = 10f, Right = 10f, Top = 5f, Bottom = 5f };).

pattern: Cannot implicitly convert type 'float\[\]' to 'string'
fix_guidance: Assign a space‑separated string to ColumnWidths instead of a float array, e.g., table.ColumnWidths = "150 150".

pattern: Table' does not contain a definition for 'AutoFitBehavior'
fix_guidance: Remove the AutoFitBehavior assignment because the Table class no longer exposes it; instead rely on automatic column sizing or set ColumnWidths explicitly, and use BorderInfo for cell borders.

pattern: Argument 2: cannot convert from 'int' to 'bool'
fix_guidance: Use the TextState overload that accepts only font name and size (e.g., new TextState("Arial", 12)) and assign the color via the ForegroundColor property instead of passing a Color to the constructor.

pattern: The type or namespace name 'TaggedContent' could not be found
fix_guidance: Add a reference to the Aspose.Pdf.Tagged namespace (using Aspose.Pdf.Tagged;) and replace deprecated classes (e.g., TableTRowElement, TableTDElement) with the current ones (TableRowElement, TableCellElement) and use ImageFragment for images.

pattern: Rectangle' does not contain a definition for 'Bottom'
fix_guidance: Replace the nonexistent 'Bottom' property with the appropriate Aspose.Pdf.Rectangle property such as LLY (lower‑left Y) or compute the bottom coordinate from URY and Height.

pattern: CS1010: Newline in constant
fix_guidance: Break the string literal into separate parts (e.g., using concatenation or a multi‑line verbatim string) so that no raw newline appears inside the quotes.

pattern: The type or namespace name 'TableRow' could not be found
fix_guidance: Add a reference to Aspose.Pdf.dll and include the proper using directive (e.g., using Aspose.Pdf;) or fully qualify the class as Aspose.Pdf.TableRow.

pattern: Row' does not contain a definition for 'IsHeader'
fix_guidance: Remove usage of the non‑existent Row.IsHeader property; instead set Table.RepeatingRowsCount to 1 and optionally configure RepeatingRowsStyle to define header formatting.

pattern: AbsorbedCell' does not contain a definition for 'IsOverrideByFragment'
fix_guidance: Replace the use of the non‑existent IsOverrideByFragment property with proper TextFragments manipulation (e.g., clear and add a new TextFragment) or upgrade to a version of Aspose.PDF that includes the property.

pattern: AbsorbedTable' does not contain a definition for 'Rows'|AbsorbedRow' does not contain a definition for 'Cells'
fix_guidance: Upgrade to a recent Aspose.Pdf for .NET version (or add the correct assembly reference) that includes the TableAbsorber API where AbsorbedTable.Rows and AbsorbedRow.Cells are defined.

pattern: TableAbsorber' does not contain a definition for 'Absorb'
fix_guidance: Add a reference to Aspose.Pdf.Facades (or update to a newer Aspose.Pdf version) and replace the obsolete Absorb call with TableAbsorber.Visit(page) or use the correct overload that accepts a Document.

pattern: Cell' does not contain a definition for 'WordWrap'
fix_guidance: Replace the nonexistent Cell.WordWrap property with Cell.IsWordWrapped (or set TextState.WordWrap via DefaultCellTextState) to enable wrapping.

pattern: Color' does not contain a definition for 'FromRgba'
fix_guidance: Replace the nonexistent FromRgba call with a supported method such as Color.FromArgb (or use Aspose.Pdf.Color constructor) to specify the color and alpha.

pattern: The type or namespace name '(TableRow|TableCell)' could not be found
fix_guidance: Replace TableRow with Row and TableCell with Cell (the correct Aspose.Pdf types) and ensure the Aspose.Pdf assembly is referenced.

pattern: AbsorbedCell' does not contain a definition for 'RowSpan'
fix_guidance: Access RowSpan/ColumnSpan via dynamic dispatch (e.g., `dynamic cell = absorbedCell; int rowSpan = (int?)cell.RowSpan ?? 1; int colSpan = (int?)cell.ColumnSpan ?? 1;`) or upgrade to a newer Aspose.Pdf version where these properties are exposed.

pattern: Row' does not contain a definition for 'Height'
fix_guidance: Replace the nonexistent Height property with the correct FixedRowHeight property (e.g., row.FixedRowHeight = 60) or use other supported row‑sizing APIs.

pattern: Rotation' does not contain a definition for 'RotateAngle90'
fix_guidance: Replace Rotation.RotateAngle90 with the correct enum value Rotation.on90.

pattern: The type name 'SqlConnection' could not be found in the namespace 'System\.Data\.SqlClient'
fix_guidance: Add a reference to the System.Data.SqlClient (or Microsoft.Data.SqlClient) package, or replace the SqlConnection/SqlCommand usage with alternative data access code.

pattern: TextFragment' does not contain a definition for 'Alignment'
fix_guidance: Use the TextState property: set tf.TextState.HorizontalAlignment = HorizontalAlignment.Center (or other value) instead of tf.Alignment.

pattern: Form.*does not contain a definition for 'ContainsKey'
fix_guidance: Remove the ContainsKey call and access the field directly via doc.Form[fieldName] with a type check (e.g., 'if (doc.Form[fieldName] is ListBoxField listBox)') since Form is not a dictionary exposing ContainsKey.

pattern: The type or namespace name 'SubmitFormAction' could not be found
fix_guidance: Add a reference to the Aspose.Pdf.Annotations assembly and include `using Aspose.Pdf.Annotations;` (or fully qualify the class) so the SubmitFormAction type is available.

pattern: The type or namespace name 'CheckBoxField' does not exist in the namespace 'Aspose\.Pdf\.Forms'
fix_guidance: Replace the removed CheckBoxField class with FormEditor.AddField(FieldType.CheckBox, ...) and add a reference to Aspose.Pdf.Facades (or the appropriate namespace for the new API).

pattern: The type or namespace name 'DefaultAppearance' does not exist in the namespace 'Aspose\.Pdf'
fix_guidance: Add a reference to the Aspose.Pdf.Text namespace (e.g., `using Aspose.Pdf.Text;`) or ensure the correct Aspose.Pdf assembly version that contains the `DefaultAppearance` class is referenced.

pattern: SaveOptions' does not contain a definition for 'AppendMode'
fix_guidance: Upgrade to a newer Aspose.Pdf for .NET version that defines the AppendMode property, or replace the AppendMode usage with the appropriate incremental‑save API (e.g., PdfFileEditor.SaveIncremental) supported by your current library.

pattern: WidgetAnnotation' does not contain a definition for 'Value'
fix_guidance: Cast the widget to the appropriate Field type (e.g., TextBoxField) or retrieve it via the Form indexer and set its Value property on the Field object, not on WidgetAnnotation.

pattern: WidgetAnnotation' does not contain a definition for '(Value|PartialName)'
fix_guidance: Replace WidgetAnnotation with the Field class from Aspose.Pdf.Forms, iterate over doc.Form.Fields, and use field.Value and field.PartialName; add the appropriate using directive.

pattern: PageInfo' does not contain a definition for 'MarginInfo'
fix_guidance: Upgrade to a Aspose.Pdf version that exposes PageInfo.MarginInfo or replace the call with a fallback (e.g., assume zero margins or use reflection to read the property when available).

pattern: The type or namespace name 'MergeOptions' could not be found
fix_guidance: Add a reference to the Aspose.Pdf.Facades namespace (or the appropriate assembly) and use PdfFileEditor.Concatenate instead of the missing MergeOptions class.

pattern: The type or namespace name 'FormField' could not be found
fix_guidance: Replace usage of FormField with WidgetAnnotation (e.g., cast doc.Form[fieldName] as WidgetAnnotation) and access its Border property; keep the Aspose.Pdf.Forms namespace referenced.

pattern: Page' does not contain a definition for 'Form'
fix_guidance: Use the appropriate form classes (e.g., FormEditor, FormFieldFacade) from Aspose.Pdf.Facades or Aspose.Pdf.Forms instead of accessing a non‑existent Page.Form property, and add the required using directives.

pattern: The type or namespace name 'XfaForm' could not be found
fix_guidance: Add a reference to the Aspose.Pdf assembly that contains XfaForm and include the correct using directive (e.g., using Aspose.Pdf.Forms;) or switch to the appropriate class (e.g., Aspose.Pdf.Facades.Form) if XfaForm is not part of the version you are using.

pattern: The type or namespace name 'HorizontalAlignment' does not exist in the namespace 'Aspose\.Pdf\.Text'
fix_guidance: Use the correct namespace: remove `using Aspose.Pdf.Text;` and add `using Aspose.Pdf;`, then reference the enum as `HorizontalAlignment.Right` (or `Aspose.Pdf.HorizontalAlignment.Right`).

pattern: AnnotationActionCollection' does not contain a definition for 'OnFocus'
fix_guidance: Replace the nonexistent OnFocus member with a supported action (e.g., OnEnter or OnExit) and ensure you have `using Aspose.Pdf.Annotations;` so that JavaScriptAction and related types are available.

pattern: Form' does not contain a definition for 'Insert'
fix_guidance: Replace the nonexistent Insert call with the Form.Add overload that accepts an index (e.g., doc.Form.Add(textBox, insertIndex)) or simply use doc.Form.Add(textBox) if ordering is not required.

pattern: Document' does not contain a definition for 'AssignXfa'
fix_guidance: Call AssignXfa via the XfaForm property (e.g., doc.XfaForm.AssignXfa(...)) and ensure the Aspose.Pdf namespace is referenced.

pattern: RichTextBoxField' does not contain a definition for 'RichText'
fix_guidance: Replace the nonexistent RichText property with the FormattedValue property (or another valid property) on RichTextBoxField to set HTML‑styled content.

pattern: WidgetAnnotation' does not contain a definition for '(FullyQualifiedName|Value)'
fix_guidance: Replace WidgetAnnotation with the proper form field type from Aspose.Pdf.Forms (e.g., Field) and use the FullName property instead of FullyQualifiedName; ensure you import Aspose.Pdf.Forms and iterate over pdfDoc.Form.Fields.

pattern: Form' does not contain a definition for 'Recalculate'
fix_guidance: Remove the call to Form.Recalculate() and enable automatic recalculation via doc.Form.AutoRecalculate = true (or use the version‑specific method for recalculation).

pattern: WidgetAnnotation' does not contain a definition for 'IsRequired'
fix_guidance: Iterate over doc.Form.Fields as Field objects and use the 'Required' property (not IsRequired); access the field's value via the Field.Value property.

pattern: TextBoxField' does not contain a definition for 'MaxLength'
fix_guidance: Replace the use of the non‑existent MaxLength property with Aspose.Pdf.Facades.Form.GetFieldLimit (or the appropriate Field.MaxLen property) after switching to the Facade API for form handling.

pattern: WidgetAnnotation' does not contain a definition for 'Page'
fix_guidance: Replace the nonexistent .Page property with .PageIndex (zero‑based) or .PageNumber on the appropriate field type, and ensure you reference the correct Aspose.Pdf namespace.

pattern: Form' does not contain a definition for 'ImportData'
fix_guidance: Replace the call to ImportData with the correct method (e.g., ImportXml on Form or use FormEditor.ImportData) and ensure you are using the appropriate facade class.

pattern: AnnotationActionCollection' does not contain a definition for 'MouseUp'
fix_guidance: Replace the nonexistent 'MouseUp' member with the correct property name (e.g., 'MouseUpAction') supported by the Aspose.Pdf version you are using.

pattern: AnnotationActionCollection' does not contain a definition for '(OnKeyDown|OnKeyUp)'
fix_guidance: Replace the nonexistent OnKeyDown/OnKeyUp properties with supported actions such as OnKeyStroke, or remove them if not needed, and ensure you reference the correct Aspose.Pdf namespace.

pattern: Resources' does not contain a definition for 'XObjects'
fix_guidance: Add a reference to the Aspose.Pdf.XObjects assembly and include `using Aspose.Pdf.XObjects;`, or access XObjects via the correct API (e.g., `page.Resources.XObjects`) that provides the XObjects collection.

pattern: Argument 1: cannot convert from 'Aspose\.Pdf\.Image' to 'System\.Drawing\.Image'
fix_guidance: Load the image as a System.Drawing.Image (e.g., System.Drawing.Image.FromFile) and pass that to AddImage, or use an overload that accepts Aspose.Pdf.Image.

pattern: Argument 1: cannot convert from 'Aspose\.Pdf\.BorderInfo' to 'Aspose\.Pdf\.Annotations\.Annotation'
fix_guidance: Pass an Annotation object (e.g., TextAnnotation, LinkAnnotation) instead of a BorderInfo; create the annotation first and assign its Border property with the BorderInfo.

pattern: Document' does not contain a definition for 'ExportData'
fix_guidance: Add a reference to Aspose.Pdf.Facades and use its classes (e.g., PdfForm) to call ExportData with ExportDataOptions instead of calling ExportData on Document.

pattern: The type or namespace name 'JavaScriptAction' could not be found
fix_guidance: Replace 'JavaScriptAction' with the correct class name 'JavascriptAction' (note the lowercase 's') and ensure the Aspose.Pdf namespace is imported.

pattern: PasswordBoxField' does not contain a constructor that takes 3 arguments
fix_guidance: Use the parameterless PasswordBoxField constructor (or the appropriate overload) and set properties manually, or modify the field via FormEditor.SetFieldLimit instead of trying to call a non‑existent three‑argument constructor.

pattern: TextBoxField' does not contain a constructor that takes 3 arguments
fix_guidance: Use the two‑parameter constructor (page, rectangle) for TextBoxField and set the field name via the PartialName property instead of passing a name to the constructor.

pattern: The type or namespace name 'DefaultAppearance' does not exist in the namespace 'Aspose\.Pdf\.Forms'
fix_guidance: Add a reference to the Aspose.Pdf.Text assembly and include `using Aspose.Pdf.Text;` (or use the appropriate Facade API) so the DefaultAppearance class is available.

pattern: AnnotationActionCollection' does not contain a definition for 'Add'
fix_guidance: Replace the direct use of AnnotationActionCollection.Add with the FormEditor API (e.g., FormEditor.AddSubmitBtn and FormEditor.SetSubmitFlag) and reference Aspose.Pdf.Facades instead of Aspose.Pdf.Annotations.

pattern: The type or namespace name 'Actions' does not exist in the namespace 'Aspose\.Pdf'
fix_guidance: Remove the `using Aspose.Pdf.Actions;` directive or replace it with the correct namespace (e.g., `Aspose.Pdf.Facades`) and ensure the required assembly is referenced.

pattern: No overload for method 'Add' takes 2 arguments
fix_guidance: Replace the call to Add with the correct method AddOption (or use the appropriate overload) when adding radio button options in Aspose.Pdf.

pattern: AnnotationActionCollection' does not contain a definition for 'Hide'
fix_guidance: Replace the nonexistent Hide action with the field's Flags property: set hiddenField.Flags = AnnotationFlags.Hidden (and add `using Aspose.Pdf.Annotations;` for the enum).

pattern: Form' does not contain a definition for '(ExportFormFieldsToJson|ImportFormFieldsFromJson)'
fix_guidance: Replace the nonexistent methods with the correct API calls – use Form.ExportToJson(stream) to export fields and Form.ImportFromJson(stream) to import them, and ensure the Aspose.Pdf namespace and a compatible library version are referenced.

pattern: ButtonField' does not contain a definition for 'OnMouseUp'
fix_guidance: Replace the nonexistent OnMouseUp call with the correct action assignment, e.g., submitButton.Actions.OnActivated = new SubmitFormAction { Url = "..." };

pattern: The type or namespace name 'WidgetAnnotation' could not be found
fix_guidance: Replace WidgetAnnotation with the correct Field type (e.g., foreach (Field field in pdfForm.Fields)) and ensure the Aspose.Pdf namespace is referenced.

pattern: JavaScriptAction could not be found
fix_guidance: Replace 'JavaScriptAction' with the correct class name 'JavascriptAction' (lowercase 's') and keep the Aspose.Pdf.Annotations using directive.

pattern: TextBoxField' does not contain a definition for 'BackColor'
fix_guidance: Replace the nonexistent 'BackColor' property with the correct 'BackgroundColor' property (e.g., txtField.BackgroundColor = Aspose.Pdf.Color.LightGray) and ensure the Aspose.Pdf namespace is imported.

pattern: Cannot implicitly convert type 'string' to 'int'
fix_guidance: Convert the string to an integer (e.g., int.Parse or int.TryParse) before assignment, or change the destination variable's type to string.

pattern: Field' does not contain a definition for '(BorderColor|BorderWidth)'
fix_guidance: Use the field's widget annotation (e.g., cast to WidgetAnnotation) or a specific field type that exposes BorderColor/BorderWidth, or set the border via the field's Border property instead of accessing BorderColor/BorderWidth directly on Field.

pattern: JavaScriptCollection' does not contain a definition for 'Add'
fix_guidance: Replace the call to `doc.JavaScript.Add(...)` with assigning a single `JavascriptAction` to `doc.OpenAction` (e.g., `doc.OpenAction = new JavascriptAction(js);`).

pattern: FormEditor' does not contain a definition for 'SetFieldPassword'
fix_guidance: Replace the nonexistent SetFieldPassword call with setting the PasswordBoxField's Value (e.g., ((PasswordBoxField)doc.Form[fieldName]).Value = "yourPassword"), or use FormEditor.SetFieldValue for the field.

pattern: TextBoxField' does not contain a definition for 'Display'
fix_guidance: Remove the unsupported Display property from TextBoxField and control visibility with JavaScript (e.g., set f.display in a script attached to the document or the checkbox) or use a supported property for hiding the field.

pattern: Argument 1: cannot convert from 'Aspose\.Pdf\.OutlineCollection' to 'Aspose\.Pdf\.OutlineItemCollection'
fix_guidance: Pass an OutlineItemCollection (e.g., doc.Outlines[1]) to the method or modify the method signature to accept OutlineCollection and iterate its items.

pattern: Cell' does not contain a definition for 'ColumnSpan'
fix_guidance: Upgrade to a newer Aspose.PDF for .NET version that includes the Cell.ColumnSpan property, or emulate spanning by inserting placeholder cells as shown in the fix.

pattern: FileAttachmentAnnotation' does not contain a definition for 'FileAttachmentIcon'
fix_guidance: Replace the nonexistent FileAttachmentAnnotation.FileAttachmentIcon enum with the correct enum (e.g., FileIcon.Paperclip) provided by Aspose.Pdf.

pattern: Border' does not contain a definition for 'Color'
fix_guidance: Replace the nonexistent Border.Color property with Border.BorderInfo.Color (or set Border.BorderInfo = new BorderInfo { Color = ... }) and ensure the appropriate Aspose.Pdf namespace is imported.

pattern: WidgetAnnotation.*does not contain a definition for 'Value'
fix_guidance: Cast the form field to Aspose.Pdf.Forms.Field (or use the correct field type) before accessing .Value, e.g., `Field field = doc.Form[fieldName] as Field; if (field != null) field.Value = ...;`

pattern: The type or namespace name 'InteractiveFeatures' does not exist in the namespace 'Aspose\.Pdf'
fix_guidance: Add a reference to the Aspose.Pdf.InteractiveFeatures assembly (or install the Aspose.Pdf.InteractiveFeatures NuGet package) and include the appropriate using directive.

pattern: .*'Color' is an ambiguous reference between 'System\.Drawing\.Color' and 'Aspose\.Pdf\.Color'.*
fix_guidance: Disambiguate the 'Color' type by using its fully qualified name or create a using alias (e.g., using AsposeColor = Aspose.Pdf.Color;).

pattern: Document' does not contain a definition for 'Tagged'
fix_guidance: Upgrade to a newer Aspose.Pdf for .NET version that includes the Document.Tagged property (or add the appropriate Aspose.Pdf.Tagged namespace) and ensure the project references that assembly.

pattern: Field' does not contain a definition for 'Annotation'
fix_guidance: Cast the retrieved form field to WidgetAnnotation (e.g., `WidgetAnnotation widget = doc.Form[fieldName] as WidgetAnnotation;`) and manipulate the widget's Flags (e.g., `widget.Flags |= AnnotationFlags.Hidden;`) instead of accessing a non‑existent `Annotation` property on Field.

pattern: Newline in constant
fix_guidance: Terminate the string literal on the same line or use a verbatim string (prefix with @) so that line breaks are allowed within the string.

pattern: FieldSerializationResult' does not contain a definition for 'IsSuccessful'
fix_guidance: Remove references to IsSuccessful, FieldName, and ErrorMessage on FieldSerializationResult; the current Aspose.Pdf API no longer exposes these properties—use the result's ToString() for diagnostics or simply ignore the collection.

pattern: Cannot implicitly convert type 'Aspose\.Pdf\.Annotations\.WidgetAnnotation' to 'Aspose\.Pdf\.Forms\.Field'
fix_guidance: Cast the WidgetAnnotation to Field (e.g., use '(Field)widget' or 'widget as Field') before assigning.

pattern: ^'AnnotationActionCollection' does not contain a definition for 'OnMouseUp' and no accessible extension method 'OnMouseUp' accepting a first argument of type 'AnnotationActionCollection' could be found.*$
fix_guidance: Replace the nonexistent 'OnMouseUp' call with the supported API (e.g., use the annotation's Actions collection to add a SubmitFormAction or use the correct event name such as 'OnMouseDown').

pattern: Property or indexer 'DefaultAppearance\.Font' cannot be assigned to|DefaultAppearance' does not contain a definition for 'FontColor'
fix_guidance: Create a DefaultAppearance via its constructor (e.g., new DefaultAppearance("Helvetica", 12, Color.Black)) and assign that object to the field; do not try to set Font or FontColor properties directly as they are read‑only.

pattern: 'AnnotationActionCollection' does not contain a definition for 'OnMouseUp'
fix_guidance: Replace the use of AnnotationActionCollection with the Aspose.Pdf.Facades.Form facade (add `using Aspose.Pdf.Facades;`) and use its methods (e.g., `BindPdf` and `PostData`) instead of trying to access `OnMouseUp`.

pattern: Argument 1: cannot convert from 'string' to 'System\.IO\.Stream'
fix_guidance: Pass a Stream (e.g., File.OpenRead(path) or a MemoryStream) instead of a file‑path string to the method expecting System.IO.Stream.

pattern: WidgetAnnotation' does not contain a definition for 'PartialName'
fix_guidance: Replace WidgetAnnotation with the Field class (e.g., foreach (Field field in doc.Form.Fields)) because PartialName, MappingName and Value are members of Field, not WidgetAnnotation; add the necessary using directives.

pattern: The type or namespace name 'Xmp' does not exist in the namespace 'Aspose\.Pdf'
fix_guidance: Add a reference to the Aspose.Pdf.Xmp assembly (or install the Aspose.Pdf.Xmp NuGet package) and ensure the appropriate using directive is present.

pattern: Form' does not contain a definition for 'SetFieldValue'
fix_guidance: Use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.FormEditor (or the Form object's Fields collection) to set values; the Form class itself has no SetFieldValue/SetCheckBoxValue methods.

pattern: Field' does not contain a definition for 'PageNumber'
fix_guidance: PageNumber is a property of WidgetAnnotation, not Field. Iterate over the page's Annotations, cast to WidgetAnnotation (or Annotation) and use its PageNumber, or access the field via the annotation instead of directly from doc.Form.

pattern: RadioButtonField' does not contain a constructor that takes 2 arguments
fix_guidance: Use the constructor that accepts only a Page (new RadioButtonField(page)) and then add options with rectangles via AddOption, using the Rectangle overload that takes left, bottom, right, top.

pattern: FormEditor' does not contain a definition for 'ImportFormFields'
fix_guidance: Use the correct FormEditor API: either call the static FormEditor.ImportFormFields(sourcePdfPath, destinationPdfPath) method or instantiate FormEditor with the destination Document and then call ImportFormFields(sourceDocument) as defined in the Aspose.PDF version you reference.

pattern: Graph\.Graph\(float, float\) is obsolete
fix_guidance: Replace the float‑based Graph constructor with the double overload, e.g., new Graph(400.0, 300.0).

pattern: Graph' does not contain a definition for 'SetPageRectangle'
fix_guidance: Remove the call to SetPageRectangle and position the Graph using its GraphInfo (e.g., set GraphInfo.Rectangle or GraphInfo.Position) or add it to the page with the desired coordinates.

pattern: Page' does not contain a definition for 'Operators'
fix_guidance: Replace usage of page.Operators with page.Contents (or the appropriate content collection) since the Operators property was removed in recent Aspose.PDF versions.

pattern: The type or namespace name 'RoundedRectangle' could not be found
fix_guidance: Replace 'RoundedRectangle' with 'Aspose.Pdf.Drawing.Rectangle', add the appropriate using directive (Aspose.Pdf.Drawing), and set the RoundedCornerRadius property on the Rectangle instance.

pattern: Graph\.Graph\(float, float\) is obsolete: 'Constructor is deprecated\. Please use constructor with double instead'
fix_guidance: Replace the float overload with the double overload, e.g., use new Graph(400.0, 300.0) instead of new Graph(400, 300).

pattern: Rectangle' does not contain a definition for 'GraphInfo'
fix_guidance: Replace Aspose.Pdf.Rectangle with Aspose.Pdf.Drawing.Rectangle (or add the correct using) because GraphInfo is defined on the drawing rectangle type.

pattern: Argument 1: cannot convert from 'double\[\]' to 'float\[\]'
fix_guidance: Convert the double[] to float[] (e.g., using .Select(d => (float)d).ToArray()) or change the method to accept double[] instead of float[].

pattern: Cannot implicitly convert type 'string' to 'Aspose\.Pdf\.Text\.TextFragment'
fix_guidance: Create a TextFragment instance with the string (e.g., new TextFragment("your text")) instead of assigning the string directly.

pattern: 'Rectangle' does not contain a definition for 'X'
fix_guidance: Use the Rectangle constructor (or its LLx/LLy/URx/URy properties) to set coordinates instead of accessing non‑existent X/Y properties.

pattern: Rectangle' is an ambiguous reference between 'Aspose\.Pdf\.Drawing\.Rectangle' and 'Aspose\.Pdf\.Rectangle'
fix_guidance: Fully qualify the Rectangle type (e.g., Aspose.Pdf.Drawing.Rectangle) or add a using alias and remove the conflicting using directive.

pattern: Path' is an ambiguous reference between 'Aspose\.Pdf\.Drawing\.Path' and 'System\.IO\.Path'
fix_guidance: Fully qualify the Path type (e.g., Aspose.Pdf.Drawing.Path) or create a using alias to disambiguate the reference.

pattern: No overload for method 'AddOption' takes 3 arguments
fix_guidance: Use the overload that accepts only two parameters (value and rectangle) or switch to FormEditor to add radio button options as shown in the updated code.

pattern: The type or namespace name 'FormEditor' could not be found
fix_guidance: Add a reference to the Aspose.Pdf.Facades assembly and include `using Aspose.Pdf.Facades;` (or fully‑qualify the type) so the FormEditor class is available.

pattern: The type or namespace name 'CheckBoxField' could not be found
fix_guidance: Add a reference to the Aspose.Pdf assembly and include the proper namespace (e.g., `using Aspose.Pdf.Forms;`) or switch to the Facades API (`Aspose.Pdf.Facades.Form`) which does not require `CheckBoxField`.

pattern: Argument 1: cannot convert from 'Aspose\.Pdf\.Forms\.Option' to 'string\?'
fix_guidance: Pass a string property of the Option (e.g., Option.Name) instead of the Option object itself when a string is expected.

pattern: The type or namespace name '(WidgetAnnotation|CheckBoxField)' could not be found
fix_guidance: Replace WidgetAnnotation with the generic Field type (or cast to the appropriate specific field class) and use the correct class name CheckboxField; add a using directive for Aspose.Pdf.Forms to reference these types.

pattern: Image' does not contain a constructor that takes 2 arguments
fix_guidance: Load the image with System.Drawing.Image (e.g., Image.FromFile) and use the Aspose.Pdf.Drawing.Image constructor that accepts a System.Drawing.Image, then assign its Rectangle property to position/size the image.

pattern: ImageStamp' does not contain a definition for 'IsBackground'
fix_guidance: Replace the nonexistent IsBackground property with the correct ImageStamp.Background property (e.g., stamp.Background = true).

pattern: Cannot implicitly convert type 'Aspose\.Pdf\.Drawing\.GradientRadialShading' to 'Aspose\.Pdf\.Color'
fix_guidance: Assign the GradientRadialShading to a shape's Shading property (e.g., arc.Shading) instead of trying to assign it to a Color variable.

pattern: The type or namespace name 'Color' does not exist in the namespace 'Aspose\.Pdf\.Drawing'
fix_guidance: Add a reference to the Aspose.Pdf.dll that contains the Drawing namespace (or upgrade to a version where Color is available) and ensure you import the correct namespace, or use Aspose.Pdf.Color if the type has moved.

pattern: The type or namespace name 'DefaultAppearance' could not be found
fix_guidance: Remove the use of the non‑existent DefaultAppearance class and set the field's appearance via the string property (e.g., field.DefaultAppearance = "/Helv 12 Tf 0 g").

pattern: GraphInfo' does not contain a definition for 'Shading'
fix_guidance: Replace the nonexistent 'Shading' member with the correct 'ShadingInfo' property (e.g., graphInfo.ShadingInfo) and ensure the appropriate Aspose.Pdf namespace is imported.

pattern: Argument \d+: cannot convert from 'double' to 'int'
fix_guidance: Pass integer values or cast to int, or use the Graph constructor overload that accepts double (e.g., new Graph(500.0, 400.0)).

pattern: Argument \d+: cannot convert from 'double' to 'float'
fix_guidance: Cast the double values to float (e.g., (float)myDouble) or use float literals (e.g., 1f) for arguments that expect float.

pattern: CS1513: \} expected
fix_guidance: Add the missing closing brace(s) to balance all opening braces and ensure the file ends with a proper class/namespace closure before any top‑level statements.

pattern: Use of unassigned local variable 'txtField'
fix_guidance: Initialize the variable before accessing its members—create the TextBoxField instance first, then assign its properties (e.g., PartialName, Value, Color, Border).

pattern: Color' does not contain a definition for 'R'
fix_guidance: Replace accesses to Color.R, Color.G, Color.B with Aspose.Pdf.Drawing.Color.GetRGBColor(r, g, b) (or use System.Drawing.Color if you need R/G/B properties).

pattern: GraphInfo' does not contain a definition for 'BoundsCheckMode'|BoundsCheckMode' does not contain a definition for 'Ignore'
fix_guidance: Reference the correct namespace (Aspose.Pdf.Drawing) and use the Graph class’s BoundsCheckMode enum (or remove the property if using a newer version where it was deprecated).

pattern: The type or namespace name 'RoundedRectangle' does not exist in the namespace 'Aspose\.Pdf\.Drawing'
fix_guidance: Replace 'RoundedRectangle' with 'Rectangle' (or the appropriate shape class) and set its RoundedCornerRadius property, or upgrade/reference a Aspose.PDF version that includes the RoundedRectangle class.

pattern: ImageStamp' does not contain a definition for '(SetOrigin|IsBackground|BlendMode)'
fix_guidance: Replace ImageStamp with the Facades Stamp class (using Aspose.Pdf.Facades) and use its properties/methods (e.g., BindImage, IsBackground, BlendMode, SetOrigin) to set the stamp attributes.

pattern: Ellipse' does not contain a definition for 'Matrix'
fix_guidance: Replace the nonexistent Ellipse.Matrix usage with the Aspose.Pdf.Matrix class (e.g., Matrix.Rotation) and apply the matrix to the ellipse's bounding rectangle or use Transform methods.

pattern: Graph\.Graph\(float, float\)
fix_guidance: Replace the obsolete Graph(float, float) calls with the double overload, e.g., new Graph(200.0, 100.0), or cast the arguments to double.

pattern: Graph' does not contain a definition for 'Clip'
fix_guidance: Replace the nonexistent Graph.Clip property with an operator call: use graph.Operators.Add(new Clip()) (and add the appropriate using for Aspose.Pdf.Operators).

pattern: The type or namespace name 'Imaging' does not exist in the namespace 'Aspose\.Pdf'
fix_guidance: Add a reference to the Aspose.Pdf.Imaging assembly or replace the using directive with the correct namespace (e.g., Aspose.Pdf.Annotations) that provides ImagePlacementAbsorber.

pattern: The type or namespace name 'BarcodeGenerator' could not be found
fix_guidance: Add a reference to the Aspose.BarCode for .NET library (e.g., Aspose.BarCode.dll) and include `using Aspose.BarCode.Generation;` at the top of the file.

pattern: XImage does not contain a definition for 'IsBlackWhite'
fix_guidance: Remove the call to the non‑existent IsBlackWhite method and replace it with your own palette‑checking logic (or simply return true) to decide whether to process the image.

pattern: Image' does not contain a definition for 'ImageData'
fix_guidance: Replace uses of Aspose.Pdf.Image with Aspose.Pdf.XImage, which provides the ImageData and Name properties; adjust code to work with XImage instances.

pattern: Image' is an ambiguous reference between 'System\.Drawing\.Image' and 'Aspose\.Pdf\.Image'
fix_guidance: Disambiguate the type by using fully qualified names (e.g., System.Drawing.Image) or create an alias with a using directive to specify which Image you intend to use.

pattern: XImage' does not contain a definition for '(Value|Key)'
fix_guidance: Replace the nonexistent 'Value' or 'Key' members with the correct XImage properties (e.g., ImageStream) and ensure you are using the Aspose.Pdf.Facades namespace.

pattern: XImage' does not contain a definition for 'ImageInfo'
fix_guidance: Replace usage of XImage.ImageInfo (which no longer exists) with the PdfExtractor facade (Aspose.Pdf.Facades) to extract images, or use XImage.FileExtension for format information; ensure the appropriate Aspose.Pdf.Facades namespace is imported.

pattern: ITaggedContent' does not contain a definition for 'CreateIllustrationElement'
fix_guidance: Remove the call to CreateIllustrationElement on ITaggedContent and instead add the image via a Page object (e.g., create an Image, set its properties, and add it to page.Paragraphs).

pattern: Document' does not contain a definition for 'DefaultFontName'
fix_guidance: Use the RenderingOptions object (e.g., doc.RenderingOptions.DefaultFontName or a separate RenderingOptions instance) instead of accessing DefaultFontName directly on Document.

pattern: GraphicsAbsorber' does not contain a definition for 'Graphics'
fix_guidance: Replace the invalid 'Graphics' member with the correct API call—use graphicsAbsorber.Elements (or another valid property/method) to access the collected vector graphics.

pattern: TextFragmentState' does not contain a definition for 'VerticalAlignment'
fix_guidance: Remove the VerticalAlignment assignment; TextFragmentState does not expose this property—use positioning or alignment settings on the TextFragment itself instead.

pattern: warning CS0618: 'Graph\.Graph\(float, float\)' is obsolete
fix_guidance: Replace the float‑based Graph constructor with the double version, e.g., use new Graph(400.0, 300.0) or cast to double.

pattern: The type or namespace name 'GraphicalObject' does not exist in the namespace 'Aspose\.Pdf\.Drawing'
fix_guidance: Replace all uses of Aspose.Pdf.Drawing.GraphicalObject with the appropriate concrete shape classes (e.g., Rectangle, Line) or the base class Shape, and adjust method signatures that expect GraphicalObject accordingly.

pattern: Image' does not contain a definition for 'AlternativeText'
fix_guidance: Import the Aspose.Pdf.Tagged namespace and use the XImage.TrySetAlternativeText method (or related tagged‑content API) instead of accessing a non‑existent AlternativeText property.

pattern: The type or namespace name 'ImageSaveOptions' could not be found
fix_guidance: Add a reference to Aspose.Pdf.Devices and replace ImageSaveOptions with PngDevice (or other appropriate device) for image export.

pattern: Image' does not contain a definition for '(ImageInfo|Left|Bottom)'
fix_guidance: Add a reference to Aspose.Pdf.Drawing (or import its namespace) so that you use Aspose.Pdf.Drawing.Image, which provides ImageInfo, Left, and Bottom properties.

pattern: The type or namespace name 'Position' could not be found
fix_guidance: Replace the undefined 'Position' type with the correct Aspose.Pdf type (e.g., Aspose.Pdf.Point) and add a using directive for Aspose.Pdf or fully‑qualify the type.

pattern: VectorGraphicsAbsorber
fix_guidance: Replace the obsolete VectorGraphicsAbsorber with GraphicsAbsorber, add `using Aspose.Pdf.Vector;`, and adjust code to use `absorber.Elements` (instead of `absorber.Graphics`).

pattern: The type or namespace name 'VectorGraphicsAbsorber' could not be found
fix_guidance: Replace the nonexistent VectorGraphicsAbsorber with the correct GraphicsAbsorber class from Aspose.Pdf and adjust the code to use its Elements collection.

pattern: The type or namespace name 'Margin' could not be found
fix_guidance: Replace the nonexistent Margin class with MarginInfo (e.g., new MarginInfo(...)) and ensure the Aspose.Pdf namespace is referenced.

pattern: The type or namespace name 'ImageFragment' could not be found
fix_guidance: Add a reference to Aspose.Pdf.dll and include the appropriate using directives (e.g., `using Aspose.Pdf;` and `using Aspose.Pdf.Text;`), then replace `ImageFragment` with the correct `Image` class and add it to a paragraph.

pattern: TextBoxField' does not contain a definition for 'BackgroundColor'
fix_guidance: Replace the nonexistent BackgroundColor property with the TextBoxField.Color property (or appropriate styling property) and ensure the Aspose.Pdf.Forms namespace is referenced.

pattern: TextFragment.*PageNumber|Position.*(X|Y)
fix_guidance: Replace usage of the removed PageNumber property with fragment.Page?.Number (or track the page during iteration) and use fragment.Rectangle.LLX/Lly instead of Position.X/Y for coordinates.

pattern: HeaderFooter' does not contain a definition for '(Text|Font|FontSize)'
fix_guidance: Create a TextFragment (or Paragraph), set its TextState.Font and TextState.FontSize, add it to HeaderFooter.Paragraphs, and assign the HeaderFooter to the page; HeaderFooter itself has no Text, Font, or FontSize properties.

pattern: The type or namespace name 'WatermarkAnnotation' could not be found
fix_guidance: Replace the nonexistent WatermarkAnnotation with a supported class such as TextStamp (or Aspose.Pdf.Annotations.WatermarkAnnotation if using a newer version) and add the appropriate using directive (e.g., Aspose.Pdf.Text).

pattern: TextFragmentState' does not contain a definition for 'Matrix'
fix_guidance: Replace the nonexistent 'Matrix' member with the supported 'Rotation' property (in degrees) on TextFragment.TextState, or use the appropriate Matrix API for the library version.

pattern: TextFragmentState' does not contain a definition for 'Rise'
fix_guidance: Use the TextFragment's TextState.Rise property (or the SetTextRise operator) instead of accessing Rise on TextFragmentState, and ensure you reference the correct Aspose.Pdf version that includes this member.

pattern: TextBuilder' does not contain a definition for 'InsertText'
fix_guidance: Replace the use of TextBuilder.InsertText with setting TextFragment.Position and adding the fragment to the page via page.Paragraphs.Add(tf).

pattern: Property or indexer 'TextFragment\.TextState' cannot be assigned to -- it is read only
fix_guidance: Do not assign a new TextState to TextFragment.TextState; instead modify the existing TextState's subproperties (e.g., Font, FontSize, ForegroundColor) and set alignment via TextFragment.HorizontalAlignment.

pattern: TextState' does not contain a definition for 'Bidi'
fix_guidance: Remove the assignment to TextState.Bidi; Aspose.PDF auto‑detects bidirectional text or use the version‑specific IsRightToLeft property if available.

pattern: TextFragmentState' does not contain a definition for 'Hyphenation'
fix_guidance: Upgrade to a newer Aspose.Pdf for .NET version that includes the Hyphenation and HyphenSymbol properties, or set hyphenation via TextFormattingOptions/Reflection if you must stay on an older version.

pattern: Cannot implicitly convert type 'Aspose\.Pdf\.Annotations\.GoToAction' to 'Aspose\.Pdf\.Hyperlink'
fix_guidance: Assign the GoToAction to the TextFragment's Action property (or wrap it in a Hyperlink object) instead of directly setting the Hyperlink property.

pattern: Position' does not contain a definition for 'X'
fix_guidance: Replace the nonexistent X/Y properties with the correct Position properties such as XIndent and YIndent.

pattern: Document' does not contain a definition for 'Replace'
fix_guidance: Use Aspose.PDF's TextFragmentAbsorber (or TextReplaceOptions) to locate and replace text instead of calling a non‑existent Document.Replace method.

pattern: The name 'File' does not exist in the current context
fix_guidance: Add `using System.IO;` at the top of the file or prefix the call with `System.IO.File` to reference the File class.

pattern: TextFragment' does not contain a definition for 'Lines'
fix_guidance: Use a ParagraphAbsorber to obtain MarkupParagraph objects, which expose the Lines property, instead of accessing a non‑existent Lines member on TextFragment.

pattern: 'TextFragment' does not contain a definition for 'GetLineInfo' and no accessible extension method 'GetLineInfo'
fix_guidance: Remove the call to GetLineInfo (or GetLineBreakInfo) and instead obtain line information by splitting the TextFragment.Text string on line‑break characters or use the appropriate API available in your Aspose.Pdf version.

pattern: Cannot implicitly convert type 'int' to 'Aspose\.Pdf\.Rotation'
fix_guidance: Cast the integer to the Rotation enum or use the enum value, e.g., firstPage.Rotate = (Rotation)90; or firstPage.Rotate = Rotation.Rotate90;

pattern: TextFragmentAbsorber' does not contain a definition for 'ErrorsInfo'
fix_guidance: Replace the nonexistent 'ErrorsInfo' member with the correct 'ErrorInfo' property provided by TextFragmentAbsorber.

pattern: No overload for method 'Replace' takes 5 arguments
fix_guidance: Use a Document.Replace overload that matches the available signature (e.g., the 4‑parameter version) or replace text per page with a TextFragmentAbsorber loop instead of passing five arguments.

pattern: Document' does not contain a definition for 'FindText'
fix_guidance: Replace the nonexistent Document.FindText call with a TextFragmentAbsorber (e.g., new TextFragmentAbsorber(regex, options)) and apply it via doc.Pages.Accept(absorber); also add the appropriate Aspose.Pdf.Text using directive.

pattern: Program does not contain a static 'Main' method suitable for an entry point
fix_guidance: Add a static Main(string[] args) method as the entry point, or change the project OutputType to a class library if no executable is needed.

pattern: Cannot create an instance of the abstract type or interface 'Hyperlink'
fix_guidance: Replace the Hyperlink instantiation with a LinkAnnotation (from Aspose.Pdf.Annotations) and assign a GoToURIAction to it, then add the annotation to the page.

pattern: The name 'FileAttachmentAnnotationIcons' does not exist in the current context
fix_guidance: Replace 'FileAttachmentAnnotationIcons' with a valid icon identifier, e.g., set Icon to a string like "Paperclip" or use the correct enum from the Aspose.PDF library.

pattern: FileAttachmentAnnotation' does not contain a definition for 'IconEnum'
fix_guidance: Replace the nonexistent IconEnum with the correct enum (e.g., FileIcon.PushPin) or use the appropriate property type for the Icon property in the current Aspose.PDF version.

pattern: FileParams' does not contain a definition for 'MimeType'
fix_guidance: Replace the use of FileParams with the correct Aspose.Pdf.FileSpecification type (or its File property) which exposes the MimeType property.

pattern: Document' does not contain a definition for 'Attachments'
fix_guidance: Use the Document.EmbeddedFiles collection with a FileSpecification (instead of Attachments) and add the file spec to the PDF; also replace the missing Attachment type with FileSpecification.

pattern: FileSpecification' does not contain a definition for 'File'
fix_guidance: Replace usage of the non‑existent File property with the correct APIs (e.g., use spec.Params.Size for the file size or spec.Contents for the stream) and ensure you reference the appropriate Aspose.PDF namespace.

pattern: FileSpecification' does not contain a definition for 'Save'
fix_guidance: Replace the nonexistent Save call with code that reads the fileSpec.Contents stream and copies it to a FileStream (e.g., using fileSpec.Contents.CopyTo(outStream)).

pattern: The type or namespace name 'EmbeddedFile' could not be found
fix_guidance: Add a reference to the Aspose.Pdf assembly (or the appropriate NuGet package) and include `using Aspose.Pdf;` so the `EmbeddedFile` type is available.

pattern: FileSpecification' does not contain a definition for 'FileName'
fix_guidance: Replace the nonexistent FileName property with the correct Name property (e.g., fileAnn.File?.Name) and ensure the appropriate Aspose.Pdf namespace is referenced.

pattern: Argument \d+: cannot convert from '.*' to '.*'
fix_guidance: Pass a Stream (e.g., FileStream or MemoryStream) for the first argument and a string (file name) for the second; use the FileSpecification constructor overload that takes (string name, Stream data) or assign a MemoryStream to the Contents property.

pattern: Document' does not contain a definition for 'Portfolio'
fix_guidance: Replace the nonexistent 'Portfolio' API with the Document.Collection API: create FileSpecification objects for each file and add them via doc.Collection.Add(fileSpec), ensuring the Aspose.Pdf namespace is referenced.

pattern: Argument \d+: cannot convert from 'string' to 'System\.IO\.Stream'
fix_guidance: Use the overload that expects a Stream for the first argument (e.g., FileStream or MemoryStream) and a string for the second, or switch to the constructor that takes a description string instead of a stream.

pattern: EmbeddedFileCollection' does not contain a definition for 'ExtractAll'
fix_guidance: Replace the non‑existent ExtractAll call with a loop over the 1‑based EmbeddedFileCollection, retrieving each FileSpecification and copying its Contents stream to a file on disk.

pattern: FileSpecification' does not contain a definition for 'GetFile'
fix_guidance: Replace the nonexistent GetFile() call with reading the file bytes from the FileSpecification.Contents stream (e.g., copy the stream into a MemoryStream and call ToArray()).

pattern: The type or namespace name 'Destination' could not be found
fix_guidance: Add a reference to the Aspose.Pdf.Annotations assembly and include `using Aspose.Pdf.Annotations;` at the top of the file.

pattern: Argument 1: cannot convert from 'string' to 'System\.Drawing\.Image'
fix_guidance: Load the file as a System.Drawing.Image (e.g., Image img = Image.FromFile(path)) and pass the Image object instead of the file path string.

pattern: PdfSaveOptions' does not contain a definition for 'DocumentInfo'
fix_guidance: Remove the use of PdfSaveOptions.DocumentInfo; set document metadata via the Document object's Info property (e.g., doc.Info.Title = "...") before saving, or assign the DocumentInfo to PdfSaveOptions.Metadata if needed.

pattern: The type or namespace name 'NUnit' could not be found
fix_guidance: Add a reference to the NUnit framework (e.g., install the NUnit NuGet package) and include `using NUnit.Framework;` in the source file.
